inputs.label: Turbine Rated Capacity (MW)
inputs.businessContext: Nameplate capacity of the wind turbine model under evaluation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nameplate capacity of the wind turbine model under evaluation.

inputs.label: Capacity Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual capacity factor based on site wind resource assessment (IEC 61400-1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual capacity factor based on site wind resource assessment (IEC 61400-1).

inputs.label: Capital Cost per MW (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total installed cost per MW, including turbine, foundation, grid connection, and logistics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total installed cost per MW, including turbine, foundation, grid connection, and logistics.

inputs.label: Operating Expenditure (USD/MWh)
inputs.businessContext: Annual operations and maintenance cost per MWh generated (includes scheduled and unscheduled maintenance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual operations and maintenance cost per MWh generated (includes scheduled and unscheduled maintenance).

inputs.label: Electricity Selling Price (USD/MWh)
inputs.businessContext: Power purchase agreement price or wholesale market price per MWh.

businessContext_i18n.en: Power purchase agreement price or wholesale market price per MWh.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) used for net present value calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) used for net present value calculation.

inputs.label: Project Lifetime (years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected operational life of the wind farm (typically 20-25 years).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected operational life of the wind farm (typically 20-25 years).

inputs.label: Annual Degradation Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual reduction in energy production due to blade wear, gearbox aging, and other factors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual reduction in energy production due to blade wear, gearbox aging, and other factors.

inputs.label: Production Tax Credit (USD/MWh)
inputs.businessContext: Government incentive per MWh generated (e.g., US PTC).

businessContext_i18n.en: Government incentive per MWh generated (e.g., US PTC).

inputs.label: Grid Availability (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of time the grid is available to accept power (curtailment factor).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of time the grid is available to accept power (curtailment factor).

inputs.label: Turbine Type
inputs.businessContext: Technology classification affecting O&M cost profiles and reliability (ISO 61400-4).

businessContext_i18n.en: Technology classification affecting O&M cost profiles and reliability (ISO 61400-4).

inputs.label: Maintenance Strategy
inputs.businessContext: Maintenance approach aligned with Lean/Six Sigma principles to minimize downtime and cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maintenance approach aligned with Lean/Six Sigma principles to minimize downtime and cost.

rules.message: Capacity factor outside typical range for most sites; verify wind resource data.
Capital cost for floating offshore is unusually low; check input.
High degradation rate contradicts predictive maintenance strategy; review assumptions.

thresholds.alert: Negative net present value; project may not be financially viable.
Internal rate of return below discount rate; value destruction likely.
Operating cost exceeds 25% of revenue; investigate cost reduction opportunities.
